caption: The video captures a formal gathering in a large, green-walled assembly hall filled with people seated in rows of benches. The top half of the footage shows a wide shot of the chamber, where many attendees are dressed in traditional white Indian attire, including kurtas and caps, seated in a tiered layout. In the bottom half, the view shifts to a close-up of Narendra Modi, who is wearing a white kurta and a light-colored sleeveless jacket. He stands behind a podium equipped with two microphones, speaking to the assembly. His hands are seen gesturing slightly as he delivers his address. The background behind him consists of a textured green wall with geometric patterns and gold-colored architectural accents. The scene transitions from the wide perspective of the crowded hall to a focused shot of the speaker at the podium.
